caption: Side window light, slate surface, f/2.8. Steam off the broth, tight crop. Ramen at Ivan, shot for the new menu.
Backlit oat-milk latte, 45° angle, linen underneath. Took three hours for the foam. Sweetleaf, Bedford Ave.
Overhead, north window only, earth tones on raw wood. Estrela's beetroot dish for the seasonal reshoot.
Side-lit oysters on black slate, hard shadow, tight frame. Gage & Tollner. Mateo says it looks like a perfume ad.
Side window light, slate surface, f/2.8. Steam off the broth, tight crop. Ramen at Ivan for the fall menu.
Warm oak table, west light at 4 PM, dish styled cool to punch the ceramic. Estrela seasonal.
Overhead flat lay, textured linen, oat milk latte pulling a heart. Sweetleaf morning.
Hard shadow, black slate, oyster shells arranged on a rule of thirds. Gage & Tollner press day.
Golden hour hitting the salt on the rim. Aska tasting menu, dish two of nine.
Off-camera Profoto through a scrim, plated on ceramic that took me three tries to find. Estrela cover option.
Sunlight through a Wythe Avenue kitchen window, roast chicken in a cast iron. Home shoot for Oatly's fall story.
Half-eaten scallion pancake, cracked ceramic plate, a sliver of chili oil. Win Son detail shot.
Ramen at Ivan Ramen for Tangerine's noodle issue. Broth first, noodles second, the egg like it means something.
Ugly Baby at 4 PM, cast iron of crab curry, hard side light, side-loading the frame with texture.
Golden Harvest Palace on a Sunday morning — steamed dumplings, my mother's favorite basket, shot fast.
Prospect Park at 6 AM, wax paper, coffee steam, cold hands. Personal frame from the walk.
Estrela on a Wednesday. Salt cod fritters, a knife I borrowed from Chef Ana, my favorite napkin.
Oatly retainer month 9. Overhead flat lay, matte oat carton, a shortlist of props I refused to swap.
Cookbook plate 42 of 120. Portuguese green soup, wide bowl, seven tries to get the swirl right.
Marlow & Sons at happy hour, salt-cured everything, hard side light. Personal walk-in shoot.
Kikkoman soy pour shot, macro 90mm, hard back light. A test frame from Tuesday's brief.
Frankies 457 on a Friday. Olive-oil pasta, matte ceramic, warm room. Off-camera Profoto softened through a bounce.
Roberta's vegan pie for the Modern Love feature. Wood-fired crust, tight overhead crop.
Sunday walk shot — Devoción window, oat milk latte, someone's crossword. Not a paid frame.
Reynard at the Wythe. Beet dish, natural window, plate reset three times for the swirl.
The Four Horsemen for Edgewater's wine issue. Backlit glass, hand-in-frame, kitchen texture.
Estrela cover treatment. Chef Ana in profile, hero dish landing in the foreground. Print-ready.
Superiority Burger for a mid-week walk-in. Vegan patty, textured bun, no dairy on the plate.
Peter Luger — steak, no creamed spinach in the frame. Editor's brief was 'primal but not smoky.'
Ivan Ramen, second look at the fall menu. Broth angle two, hero noodle lift.
Nom Wah, a Sunday out with Linda, my mother's dumpling of choice. Snap from the phone, not the A7IV.
Vinegar Hill House. Wood-fired everything, low ambient, Profoto through a diffuser.
Cafe Mogador. Tagine steam, tight overhead, cinnamon frame. Editor asked for 'warm but not brown.'
Otway on Fulton. Beet plate, ceramic borrowed from the kitchen, morning light hitting the counter.
Momofuku Ssäm. Rice bowl, no ricotta in frame, chili crisp doing the color work.
Wildair. Salt-cured everything, wine glass in the corner as a color break.
Aunts et Uncles for the vegan brunch feature. Full dairy-free plate, no substitutions on set.
Sweetleaf window at 8:45 AM. Third latte, second edit pass, no shoot on the calendar.
Champs on a Tuesday — vegan biscuits & gravy shot for Modern Love Brooklyn's fall feature.
Modern Love Brooklyn. Vegan mac, textured ceramic, warm ambient.
Prospect Park at dawn. Not a shoot, just a note-to-self about light.
Kent Ave walk shot — a coffee cup, someone's dog, orange awning. Wednesday.
Golden Harvest Palace, prints for Linda. She hangs them in the kitchen next to my brother's report cards.
Cookbook plate 63 — pastel de nata frame. Warm ceramic, hard light, no dairy substitute in the recipe.
Estrela hero — Chef Ana's grandmother's recipe, plate reset five times. This is the take.
Test frame from Jonas at Oatly. Oat milk in a low ceramic, plant shadow, warm bounce.
Devoción window, mid-editing break, latte number two, half-written caption on the notebook.
Ugly Baby crispy crab curry — chef sent the recipe over the summer, finally shot it for personal.
Blue Bottle. Oat milk cortado, morning light on a wooden counter. Not paid, not brand.
Kikkoman brief take one. Soy pour on rice, tight overhead, hard back-light.
She Wolf sourdough loaf, morning frame. Ate the heel walking home.
Ivan Ramen kids' menu update — the small bowl frame. Hero angle refined.
Los Tacos No. 1 for a Grub Street round-up. Al pastor, corn tortilla, no dairy.
Frankies 457 pasta plate. Olive oil forward, no cream in frame, warm room, Friday.
Estrela salt cod fritters — the counter-top light hit right for once.
Sweetleaf again. It's my desk when the apartment gets too quiet.
Tangerine winter issue prelim — hearth dish, hard side light, textured linen.
Test frame for the Night Markets pitch. Flushing 4 AM, wet asphalt, red lantern reflection.
Roberta's vegan pie. Second look, brighter crust, tighter frame.
Wildair oysters — natural back-light, hand in frame, wine glass corner-punch.
The Four Horsemen bread plate. Sourdough, olive oil, salt. Nothing else.
Emmy Squared vegan Detroit pie test frame. Hero angle from the pass.
Reynard vegetables. Beet + fennel + citrus, natural window, minimal styling.
Marlow & Sons dinner shift, drop-in for personal. Salt-cured everything.
Diner Williamsburg. Menu changes daily, so does the mood board.
Nom Wah har gow, an aunt's basket, Sunday mid-morning, phone frame.
Estrela family meal, off the record. Chef Ana's kitchen, natural light, my second lunch.
Cookbook plate 78 — grilled sardines. Warm plate, textured linen, no dairy.
Golden Harvest Palace — turnip cake plate for Linda's Sunday memory book.
Oatly campaign hero. Barista pull, oat milk latte, wooden counter. Second edit pass.
Kikkoman test — braised eggplant, tight crop, chopstick in frame, back-light.
Test frame for the Edgewater pitch. Fried rice at Ugly Baby, back-lit, no butter in the pan.
Cookbook plate 90 — bacalhau à brás. Amber lighting, textured platter, no substitutions.
Aska tasting course three of nine. Tight overhead, dish set at a slight angle.
Modern Love Brooklyn — vegan burger + fries. Ceramic borrowed from Chef Ana's shelf.
Sweetleaf oat latte, Bedford Ave, morning walk to Estrela. Not a shoot, still framed like one.
Aunts et Uncles callaloo plate — full dairy-free, no swap, warm ambient.
Ivan Ramen shio bowl — natural light, hero pour, one steady take.
Peter Luger porterhouse, editor asked for 'primal but restrained.' Delivered.
Test frame from Tangerine's spring shoot brief. Green plate, textured ceramic, off-camera light.
Devoción morning latte, plant shadow, wooden counter. Not paid, not brand.
Kikkoman soy on rice — final delivery frame, tight overhead, chopstick in frame.
Estrela grilled pork tartine — plate reset three times, this is the take.
Cookbook plate 104 — arroz de pato. Cast iron, textured cloth, natural light.
Wildair small plates — a Tuesday walk-in for the wine issue teaser.
Sunday scout at She Wolf. Not a paid shoot, but I bought two loaves.
Golden Harvest Palace char siu bao — Linda's favorite basket, phone frame.
Oatly retainer — barista latte art shot for the winter push.
Test frame at Marlow Goods — muffin case + coffee, warm ambient light.
Reynard fennel salad — bright natural light, tight overhead, no cream in frame.
Champs vegan chicken and waffles — hero shot, back-lit, no dairy on the plate.
Cookbook plate 117 — leitão. Warm platter, textured cloth, natural light through the west window.
Test frame for the Kikkoman miso brief. Bowl of soup, tight overhead, natural back-light.
Superiority Burger — vegan burger + potato salad, no cream on the plate.
Estrela winter menu preview — Chef Ana's take on caldeirada. Hero angle three of five.
Nom Wah shrimp roll — Sunday brunch out with Linda, phone frame from the corner booth.
Sweetleaf again, again. Oat milk latte, half-written caption, mostly quiet room.
Kikkoman brief take two — braised tofu, hard side light, tight overhead.
Test frame at Emmy Squared — vegan Detroit pie, cheesier crust than the previous test.
Blue Bottle oat cortado — Kent Ave morning, tight crop, warm counter.
Estrela cookbook plate 128 — pastel de bacalhau. Warm ceramic, natural light.
